title: RBAC — roles and permissions matrix
content: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) ensures your team members have the appropriate level of access. The 'Viewer' role can only view dashboards and alerts. The 'Editor' role can create, edit, and delete dashboards and alert rules. The 'Billing Manager' role can view invoices and change payment methods but cannot view cloud metrics. The 'Admin' role has full access, including managing users and API keys. Custom roles (e.g., 'Database Admin' restricted to RDS metrics only) can be configured exclusively on the Enterprise plan. This section provides additional context to ensure comprehensive documentation. The CloudDash platform is built with robustness and scalability in mind. When encountering issues, always verify your configuration settings and ensure that your network allows communication with our endpoints. If you continue to experience difficulties, please consult the troubleshooting steps outlined previously. Our support team is available to assist you with any advanced configurations or unexpected behavior. Remember to keep your agent versions up to date to benefit from the latest features and security patches. Furthermore, monitoring your usage limits can prevent unexpected service interruptions. For detailed API specifications, refer to our developer portal. We are committed to providing reliable service and continuous improvements to our platform. Should you have any feedback or feature requests, do not hesitate to reach out. Thank you for choosing CloudDash as your monitoring solution. We hope this guide has been helpful in resolving your query.
